title: Reverse Proxies, Forwarded Trust, Message Framing, and Smuggling Defense · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs reverse proxies, forwarded trust, message framing, and smuggling defense from bounded request and server evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the proxy rewrite and parser-consistency threat model. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for proxy rewrite and parser-consistency threat model after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidenc…
objectives: Trace downstream and upstream connections, hop-by-hop versus end-to-end fields, termination points, authority, scheme, client address, and failure ownership.
Use ReverseProxy.Rewrite with separate inbound and outbound requests, SetURL and reviewed SetXForwarded behavior, and reject deprecated Director trust assumptions.
Strip untrusted forwarding fields, rebuild them only at trusted hops, constrain backend targets, remove hop-by-hop state, and prevent header spoofing.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Proxy Query Response Defense
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team handles case 5622 in a public status API serving assistive and low-bandwidth clients. Build deterministic Go evidence to reject ambiguous framing and deprecated Director-style proxy mutation; then lower the byte or time budget and prove rejection occurs at the owning boundary. Browser code models decisions only. Listener, TLS, database, proxy, race, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Handle unparsable query parameters, backend timeouts, bounded bodies, ModifyResponse, ErrorHandler, streaming, Alt-Svc, and sanitized failure evidence.

Inspect the Proxy Query Response Defense trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
